Pokémon Yellow Extended — v0.0.2
=================================
Pokémon Yellow with the 3 Johto starter lines (Chikorita, Cyndaquil, Totodile +
evolutions) added as Pokédex #152-160 — 160 Pokémon total. Runs natively.

v0.0.2: back sprites of the new Gen 2 mon are now full-detail 48x48 (no blur).

HOW TO PLAY
1. Run Pokemon_Yellow_Extended.exe
2. Select your own legally-obtained Pokémon Yellow ROM (.gbc). The enhancement
   patch (Pokemon_Yellow_Extended.bps) is applied automatically; the enhanced
   ROM "<yourrom>.extended.gbc" is created next to the exe (one-time).
3. NEW GAME. The Johto starters can be defined/encountered per the build.

No ROM is included — supply your own. Built from the pret decompilation.
Controls: arrows = D-pad, Z = A, X = B, Enter = Start, RShift = Select, Esc = menu.
